_comment: Manual cluster overrides for SOL-R inputs the auto-matcher misclassified or couldn't assign. Keyed by side|itype|iid|mode (mode='*' applies to all modes for that physical input).

L|button|9|*.body_override: Decoy Burst Size Dec / Tractor Distance Inc.

L|button|10|*.body_override: Decoy Burst Size Inc / Tractor Distance Inc.

L|axis|3|*.body_override: Mining Throttle / Salvage Beam Spacing / Turret Limiter (vjoy 1 z)

L|axis|4|*.body_override: Analog hat X (vjoy 1 rotx, player movement X in foot mode)

L|axis|5|*.body_override: Analog hat Y (vjoy 1 roty, player movement Y in foot mode)

R|axis|4|*.body_override: Analog hat X (vjoy 2 rotx, mouse-driven Freelook X)

R|axis|5|*.body_override: Analog hat Y (vjoy 2 roty, mouse-driven Freelook Y)
